statement: In every magma, Equation 3450 (`x * y = z * (w * (u * x))`) implies Equation 3403 (`x * y = z * (y * (y * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0566
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op w (op u x)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op y (op y w)))
